debug_info.goal:
case zero
L : Logic ℕ
χ ξ : Formula ℕ
T : LO.Propositional.FTheory L
hT : χ ➝ ξ ∉ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T
φ : Formula ℕ
Γ : Finset (Formula ℕ)
hΓ : ↑Γ ⊆ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction L χ ξ T hT (encode φ)
hφ : Γ.conj ⋏ φ ➝ ξ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T
⊢ χ ➝ φ ∉ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T

failed_attempts:
exact fun h => hT (T.imp_closed (φ := Γ.conj ⋏ φ) hφ (T.andIR (hΓ (by simpa using (show Γ.conj ∈ (↑Γ : Set (Formula ℕ)) from by
      simpa using (Finset.conj_mem (Γ := Γ))))) h))

intro hχφ
    exact hT (T.imp_closed (φ := Γ.conj ⋏ φ) (ψ := ξ) hφ (by
      have hΓ' : (Γ.conj ➝ χ) ∈ T.theory := by
        apply T.imp_closed (φ := χ) (ψ := Γ.conj)

intro hχφ
    have hmem : Γ.conj ∈ construction T hT (encode φ) := by
      have : ∀ {δ}, δ ∈ Γ → δ ∈ construction T hT (encode φ) := by
        intro δ hδ
        exact hΓ (by simpa using hδ)
      clear hΓ
      induction Γ using Finset.induction with
      | empty =>
        simp [Finset.conj]
      | @insert a s ha ih =>
        have ha' : a ∈ construction T hT (encode φ) := this (by simp)
        have hs' : ∀ {δ}, δ ∈ s → δ ∈ construction T hT (encode φ) := by
          intro δ hδ
          exact this (by simp [hδ])
        have ih' : s.conj ∈ construction T hT (encode φ) := by
          exact ih (by
            intro δ hδ
            exact hs' hδ)
        have hand : a ⋏ s.conj ∈ construction T hT (encode φ) := by
          refine (T.andIR ?_ ?_)
          · exact ha'
          · exact ih'
        simpa [Finset.conj, ha, hand]
    have : χ ➝ Γ.conj ∈ T.theory := by
      exact hχφ
    have h1 : χ ➝ (Γ.conj ⋏ φ) ∈ T.theory := by
      apply T.imp_closed (L := L) (φ := χ) (ψ := Γ.conj ⋏ φ)
      · exact andIntro (ψ := Γ.conj) (χ := φ)
      · exact T.andIR this hχφ
    have h2 : χ ➝ ξ ∈ T.theory := by
      apply T.imp_closed (L := L) (φ := Γ.conj ⋏ φ) (ψ := ξ)
      · exact hφ
      · exact (T.imp_closed (L := L) (φ := χ) (ψ := Γ.conj ⋏ φ) (by
            apply mem_trans (T := T) h1 (by
              apply T.imp_closed (L := L) (φ := Γ.conj ⋏ φ) (ψ := ξ)
              · exact Logic.iff_provable.mp (by simp)
              · exact hφ)) (by
            exact T.andIR this hχφ))
    exact hT h2

intro hχφ
    exact hT (T.imp_closed hφ hχφ)
exact fun h => hT (T.imp_closed hφ h)
exact fun h => hT (T.imp_closed hφ h)
